name: Button
description: A FormaUI button — "Material 3 with better defaults" — one entry point covering all five Material 3 button variants via a single variant parameter, with a default-on press-scale micro-interaction layered on the ripple.

composables.name: FormaButton
composables.summary: One entry point for all five Material 3 button variants, with FormaUI shape/padding defaults and an enforced 48dp minimum touch target.

params.name: onClick
params.description: Called when the button is clicked. Not invoked while enabled is false.

params.name: modifier
params.description: The Modifier applied to the button. A minimum height of FormaButtonDefaults.MinTouchTargetSize is always merged in.

params.name: variant
params.description: The visual emphasis (defaults to FormaButtonVariant.Filled).

params.name: enabled
params.description: Whether the button is interactive. When false it is visually de-emphasised and does not respond to input.

params.name: shape
params.description: The button's container shape (defaults to FormaButtonDefaults.shape).

params.name: colors
params.description: The container/content colors. When null, the Material 3 default colors for the chosen variant are used.

params.name: contentPadding
params.description: Padding between the container edges and the content (defaults to FormaButtonDefaults.contentPadding).

params.name: interactionSource
params.description: The MutableInteractionSource for observing/emitting interactions. When null, one is remembered internally.

params.name: pressedScale
params.description: The scale factor applied while the button is pressed (defaults to a subtle 0.97). Must be greater than 0.

params.name: pressAnimationSpec
params.description: The animation used for the press-scale's release spring-back (defaults to a responsive spring; the press dip uses FormaPressScaleDefaults.DownAnimationSpec). Pass null to disable the press-scale entirely.

params.name: content
params.description: The button's content, laid out in a RowScope (typically a Text, optionally with a leading/trailing Icon).

supportingApi.name: FormaButtonVariant
supportingApi.summary: Visual emphasis of a FormaButton, listed highest to lowest: Filled, Tonal, Elevated, Outlined, Text.

supportingApi.name: FormaButtonDefaults
supportingApi.summary: Defaults for FormaButton: MinTouchTargetSize (48dp), shape (FormaTheme.shapes.md), contentPadding (lg horizontal / xs vertical spacing tokens).

supportingApi.name: Modifier.formaPressScale
supportingApi.summary: Reusable press-scale micro-interaction (dev.formaui.components.interaction): observes an InteractionSource and scales the element to pressedScale while pressed via graphicsLayer, so measured size and the 48dp touch target are unaffected. animationSpec = null disables it.

supportingApi.name: FormaPressScaleDefaults
supportingApi.summary: Defaults for Modifier.formaPressScale: PressedScale (0.97), DownAnimationSpec (a fast 100ms tween for the press dip), and AnimationSpec (a medium-stiffness, low-bouncy spring for the release spring-back).

accessibility: A minimum 48dp touch target (FormaButtonDefaults.MinTouchTargetSize) is always enforced; Role.Button semantics and disabled state are inherited from the underlying Material 3 button.

name: TextField
description: A FormaUI text field — "Material 3 with better defaults" — one entry point covering both Material 3 text-field families via variant, with fully hoisted state.

composables.name: FormaTextField
composables.summary: One entry point for both Material 3 text-field families (outlined and filled), with hoisted value state and helper/error supporting text on one line below the field.

params.name: value
params.description: The current text to display.

params.name: onValueChange
params.description: Called with the updated text as the user edits. The caller must hoist and persist the new value for it to appear.

params.name: modifier
params.description: The Modifier applied to the field.

params.name: variant
params.description: The container style (defaults to FormaTextFieldVariant.Outlined).

params.name: enabled
params.description: Whether the field is editable and focusable. When false it is visually de-emphasised and ignores input.

params.name: readOnly
params.description: Whether the field is read-only: it shows value and is focusable/selectable but not editable.

params.name: label
params.description: Optional floating label describing the field.

params.name: placeholder
params.description: Optional placeholder shown while the field is empty.

params.name: leadingIcon
params.description: Optional slot rendered at the start of the field.

params.name: trailingIcon
params.description: Optional slot rendered at the end of the field.

params.name: isError
params.description: Whether the field is in the error state (error styling + accessibility signal).

params.name: helperText
params.description: Optional supporting text shown below the field when not in error.

params.name: errorText
params.description: Optional supporting text shown below the field while isError is true; takes precedence over helperText.

params.name: singleLine
params.description: Whether the field is constrained to a single line.

params.name: textStyle
params.description: The TextStyle applied to the input text (defaults to the ambient text style; pass FormaTheme.typography.numeric for tabular numeric entry).

params.name: visualTransformation
params.description: Transforms the visual representation of value (e.g. password dots).

params.name: keyboardOptions
params.description: Software-keyboard configuration (type, IME action, capitalization).

params.name: keyboardActions
params.description: Callbacks for IME actions.

params.name: shape
params.description: The container shape. When null, the variant's sensible default is used (FormaTextFieldDefaults.outlinedShape for outlined, M3's shape for filled).

params.name: colors
params.description: The field colors. When null, the M3 default colors for the variant are used.

params.name: interactionSource
params.description: The MutableInteractionSource for observing/emitting interactions (focus, press). When null, one is remembered internally.

supportingApi.name: FormaTextFieldVariant
supportingApi.summary: Container style of a FormaTextField: Outlined (default), Filled.

supportingApi.name: FormaTextFieldDefaults
supportingApi.summary: Defaults for FormaTextField: outlinedShape (FormaTheme.shapes.md).

codeSample:
var amount by remember { mutableStateOf("") }
FormaTextField(
    value = amount,
    onValueChange = { amount = it },
    label = "Amount",
    helperText = "Available balance: $5,000.00",
    singleLine = true,
)
accessibility: isError applies error styling and surfaces the error state to accessibility services via the underlying M3 field; supply a contentDescription on any leading/trailing icon that conveys meaning.

name: Card
description: A FormaUI card — a themed container with an opinionated header / content / footer slot API covering all three Material 3 card families via variant; clickable cards get a default-on press-scale micro-interaction (shared Modifier.formaPressScale).

composables.name: FormaCard
composables.summary: A themed container with header / content / footer slots stacked vertically, optionally clickable via onClick, covering all three M3 card families.

params.name: modifier
params.description: The Modifier applied to the card.

params.name: variant
params.description: The surface style (defaults to FormaCardVariant.Elevated).

params.name: onClick
params.description: Optional click handler. When non-null the entire card becomes clickable and focusable; when null the card is a static container.

params.name: enabled
params.description: Whether the card responds to clicks. Only meaningful when onClick is non-null.

params.name: shape
params.description: The card's container shape (defaults to FormaCardDefaults.shape).

params.name: colors
params.description: The card colors. When null, the M3 default colors for the variant are used.

params.name: contentPadding
params.description: Padding between the card edges and its slots (defaults to FormaCardDefaults.contentPadding).

params.name: interactionSource
params.description: The MutableInteractionSource for observing/emitting interactions. When null, one is remembered internally for the clickable card. Unused when onClick is null.

params.name: pressedScale
params.description: The scale factor applied while a clickable card is pressed (defaults to a subtler 0.98 — large surfaces read a small dip clearly). Must be greater than 0. Unused when onClick is null.

params.name: pressAnimationSpec
params.description: The animation used for the press-scale's release spring-back (defaults to a responsive spring; the press dip uses FormaPressScaleDefaults.DownAnimationSpec). Pass null to disable the press-scale entirely. Unused when onClick is null.

params.name: header
params.description: Optional slot rendered above content (e.g. a title row).

params.name: footer
params.description: Optional slot rendered below content (e.g. an action row).

params.name: content
params.description: The card's main content, laid out in a ColumnScope.

supportingApi.name: FormaCardVariant
supportingApi.summary: Surface style of a FormaCard: Elevated (default), Outlined, Filled.

supportingApi.name: FormaCardDefaults
supportingApi.summary: Defaults for FormaCard: shape (FormaTheme.shapes.lg), contentPadding (FormaTheme.spacing.md on all sides), PressedScale (0.98 — a subtler press-scale dip for large surfaces).

accessibility: When onClick is non-null the entire card is a single clickable/focusable target; Role.Button semantics and the ripple are handled by the underlying M3 clickable card.

name: Chip
description: A FormaUI chip — "Material 3 with better defaults" — one entry point covering all four Material 3 chip types via variant, with a default-on press-scale micro-interaction (shared Modifier.formaPressScale).

composables.name: FormaChip
composables.summary: One entry point for all four Material 3 chip types; selected is honored only by the Filter and Input variants, and trailingIcon is ignored for Suggestion.

params.name: label
params.description: The chip's text label.

params.name: onClick
params.description: Called when the chip is clicked. For selectable variants, toggle selected in response.

params.name: modifier
params.description: The Modifier applied to the chip.

params.name: variant
params.description: The chip kind (defaults to FormaChipVariant.Assist).

params.name: selected
params.description: Whether the chip is selected. Only meaningful for FormaChipVariant.Filter and FormaChipVariant.Input.

params.name: enabled
params.description: Whether the chip is interactive.

params.name: leadingIcon
params.description: Optional slot at the start of the chip (for FormaChipVariant.Suggestion this is the chip's single icon).

params.name: trailingIcon
params.description: Optional slot at the end of the chip. Ignored for FormaChipVariant.Suggestion.

params.name: shape
params.description: The chip's container shape (defaults to FormaChipDefaults.shape).

params.name: interactionSource
params.description: The MutableInteractionSource for observing/emitting interactions. When null, one is remembered internally.

params.name: pressedScale
params.description: The scale factor applied while the chip is pressed (defaults to a subtle 0.97). Must be greater than 0.

params.name: pressAnimationSpec
params.description: The animation used for the press-scale's release spring-back (defaults to a responsive spring; the press dip uses FormaPressScaleDefaults.DownAnimationSpec). Pass null to disable the press-scale entirely.

supportingApi.name: FormaChipVariant
supportingApi.summary: Kind of a FormaChip: Assist, Filter, Input, Suggestion.

supportingApi.name: FormaChipDefaults
supportingApi.summary: Defaults for FormaChip: shape (FormaTheme.shapes.md).

codeSample:
var selected by remember { mutableStateOf(false) }
FormaChip(
    label = "Filter",
    onClick = { selected = !selected },
    variant = FormaChipVariant.Filter,
    selected = selected,
)
FormaChip(label = "Assist", onClick = { })
accessibility: Chips keep Material 3's compact visual height while automatically exposing a 48dp touch target via M3's minimum interactive component size — no explicit height is forced.

name: Badge
description: A FormaUI badge — a small status marker for indicating unread counts or presence.

composables.name: FormaBadge
composables.summary: A small status marker: a dot badge when count is null, otherwise a numeric badge capped at maxCount with a trailing + (e.g. 99+).

params.name: modifier
params.description: The Modifier applied to the badge.

params.name: count
params.description: The number to display, or null for a dot badge.

params.name: maxCount
params.description: The largest number shown verbatim; above it the badge shows "$maxCount+" (defaults to 99). Ignored for dot badges.

params.name: containerColor
params.description: The badge background color (defaults to the M3 error color).

params.name: contentColor
params.description: The badge text color (defaults to the content color for containerColor).

composables.name: FormaBadgedBox
composables.summary: Anchors a badge to the top-end corner of some content — the FormaUI wrapper over Material 3's BadgedBox.

params.name: badge
params.description: The badge to draw at the content's top-end corner (typically a FormaBadge).

params.name: modifier
params.description: The Modifier applied to the box.

params.name: content
params.description: The element the badge is anchored to.

accessibility: The badge is decorative; put the meaningful description (including any count) on the annotated element's contentDescription (e.g. "Messages, 5 unread") — not on the badge — so screen readers announce it in context.

name: Switch
description: A FormaUI switch — a themed on/off toggle for a single setting.

composables.name: FormaSwitch
composables.summary: A stateless on/off toggle with hoisted checked state; pass onCheckedChange = null for a display-only switch toggled elsewhere.

params.name: checked
params.description: Whether the switch is on.

params.name: onCheckedChange
params.description: Called with the new value when the user toggles the switch, or null to make the switch non-interactive.

params.name: modifier
params.description: The Modifier applied to the switch.

params.name: enabled
params.description: Whether the switch is interactive.

params.name: thumbContent
params.description: Optional slot drawn inside the thumb (e.g. a check icon when checked).

params.name: colors
params.description: The switch colors (defaults to the M3 defaults, themed by FormaTheme).

params.name: interactionSource
params.description: The MutableInteractionSource for observing/emitting interactions. When null, one is remembered internally.

accessibility: The interactive control exposes a 48dp touch target via Material 3's minimum interactive component size; pass onCheckedChange = null to render a display-only switch whose toggling is handled elsewhere (e.g. by a click on an enclosing row).

name: Checkbox
description: A FormaUI checkbox — a themed binary selection control.

composables.name: FormaCheckbox
composables.summary: A stateless binary selection control with hoisted checked state; pass onCheckedChange = null when an enclosing toggleable row owns the toggle.

params.name: checked
params.description: Whether the box is checked.

params.name: onCheckedChange
params.description: Called with the new value when toggled, or null to make the checkbox non-interactive.

params.name: modifier
params.description: The Modifier applied to the checkbox.

params.name: enabled
params.description: Whether the checkbox is interactive.

params.name: colors
params.description: The checkbox colors (defaults to the M3 defaults, themed by FormaTheme).

params.name: interactionSource
params.description: The MutableInteractionSource for observing/emitting interactions. When null, one is remembered internally.

accessibility: 48dp touch target via Material 3's minimum interactive component size; when placing next to a label, prefer toggling from the row (Modifier.toggleable with Role.Checkbox) and pass onCheckedChange = null so the whole row is one accessible target.

name: RadioButton
description: A FormaUI radio button — a themed control for choosing one option from a set.

composables.name: FormaRadioButton
composables.summary: A stateless single-choice control with hoisted selected state; group several with Modifier.selectableGroup() and pass onClick = null when the row owns selection.

params.name: selected
params.description: Whether this option is the selected one in its group.

params.name: onClick
params.description: Called when this option is clicked, or null to make the radio button non-interactive.

params.name: modifier
params.description: The Modifier applied to the radio button.

params.name: enabled
params.description: Whether the radio button is interactive.

params.name: colors
params.description: The radio button colors (defaults to the M3 defaults, themed by FormaTheme).

params.name: interactionSource
params.description: The MutableInteractionSource for observing/emitting interactions. When null, one is remembered internally.

accessibility: 48dp touch target via Material 3's minimum interactive component size; apply Modifier.selectableGroup() to the container so screen readers announce the set and position (e.g. "2 of 4"), and prefer row-level Modifier.selectable with onClick = null so the whole row is one accessible target.

name: Dialog
description: A FormaUI alert dialog — a modal that interrupts the user for a decision or acknowledgement, delegating to Material 3's AlertDialog.

composables.name: FormaAlertDialog
composables.summary: Modal alert dialog for a decision or acknowledgement; shown while composed, with hoisted visibility state.

params.name: onDismissRequest
params.description: called when the dialog is dismissed by tapping outside or pressing back.

params.name: confirmButton
params.description: the primary action (required).

params.name: modifier
params.description: the Modifier applied to the dialog surface.

params.name: dismissButton
params.description: the optional secondary/cancel action.

params.name: icon
params.description: optional icon shown above the title.

params.name: title
params.description: optional dialog title.

params.name: text
params.description: optional supporting body text.

params.name: shape
params.description: the dialog container shape (defaults to FormaDialogDefaults.shape).

composables.name: FormaFullScreenDialog
composables.summary: Full-screen modal dialog for a focused multi-step task, with a top bar hosting Close, the title, and an optional confirm action.

params.name: onDismissRequest
params.description: called when the user closes the dialog (Close button or back press).

params.name: title
params.description: the dialog's title, shown in the top bar.

params.name: modifier
params.description: the Modifier applied to the dialog surface.

params.name: confirmAction
params.description: optional top-bar action slot at the end (e.g. a "Save" FormaButton).

params.name: content
params.description: the dialog body, laid out in a scrollable ColumnScope.

supportingApi.name: FormaDialogDefaults
supportingApi.summary: Default values for FormaUI dialogs; shape returns FormaTheme.shapes.xl.

name: BottomSheet
description: A FormaUI modal bottom sheet — content that slides up from the bottom over a scrim, delegating to Material 3's ModalBottomSheet.

composables.name: FormaBottomSheet
composables.summary: Modal bottom sheet shown while composed; the Material 3 SheetState is managed internally so callers only need FormaUI's opt-in.

params.name: onDismissRequest
params.description: called when the sheet is dismissed.

params.name: modifier
params.description: the Modifier applied to the sheet.

params.name: skipPartiallyExpanded
params.description: when true, the sheet has no half-expanded state and opens fully.

params.name: shape
params.description: the sheet container shape. When null, Material 3's top-rounded default is used.

params.name: content
params.description: the sheet's content, laid out in a ColumnScope.

name: NavigationBar
description: A FormaUI bottom navigation bar — top-level destination switching, delegating to Material 3's NavigationBar.

composables.name: FormaNavigationBar
composables.summary: Bottom navigation bar container; populate its RowScope content with FormaNavigationBarItems.

params.name: modifier
params.description: the Modifier applied to the bar.

params.name: content
params.description: the bar's items, laid out in a RowScope (typically FormaNavigationBarItems).

composables.name: FormaNavigationBarItem
composables.summary: A single destination in a FormaNavigationBar (RowScope extension) with built-in numeric or dot badge support on the icon.

params.name: selected
params.description: whether this item is the current destination.

params.name: onClick
params.description: called when the item is tapped.

params.name: icon
params.description: the item's icon (supply a contentDescription on it for accessibility).

params.name: modifier
params.description: the Modifier applied to the item.

params.name: label
params.description: optional text label shown under the icon.

params.name: enabled
params.description: whether the item is interactive.

params.name: badgeCount
params.description: optional unread count to show as a numeric badge on the icon.

params.name: showBadgeDot
params.description: when true and badgeCount is null, shows a dot badge on the icon.

params.name: alwaysShowLabel
params.description: whether the label is shown even when the item is unselected.

accessibility: 48dp touch target and selection semantics come from Material 3's NavigationBarItem; supply a contentDescription on each item's icon for accessibility.

name: ListItem
description: A FormaUI list item — a single row for lists, menus, and settings, delegating to Material 3's ListItem.

composables.name: FormaListItem
composables.summary: List row whose single-/two-/three-line layout is derived automatically from which of headline/overline/supporting are supplied, with optional leading/trailing slots and click handling.

params.name: headline
params.description: the primary text of the row.

params.name: modifier
params.description: the Modifier applied to the row.

params.name: overline
params.description: optional label shown above headline.

params.name: supporting
params.description: optional secondary text shown below headline.

params.name: leading
params.description: optional slot at the start of the row.

params.name: trailing
params.description: optional slot at the end of the row.

params.name: onClick
params.description: optional click handler; when non-null the whole row becomes clickable.

params.name: enabled
params.description: whether the row responds to clicks. Only meaningful when onClick is non-null.

params.name: colors
params.description: the row colors (defaults to the M3 defaults, themed by FormaTheme).

codeSample:
Column {
    FormaListItem(
        headline = "Single line",
        trailing = { Text("›") },
        onClick = {},
    )
    FormaDivider()
    FormaListItem(
        headline = "Ada Lovelace",
        supporting = "ada@example.com",
        leading = { FormaAvatar(initials = "AL", size = FormaAvatarSize.Small) },
        onClick = {},
    )
}
accessibility: Passing onClick makes the whole row a single clickable/focusable target with Role.Button semantics; M3 list items already meet the 48dp minimum height.

name: Avatar
description: A FormaUI avatar container — a circular (by default) tinted surface that centers its content.

composables.name: FormaAvatar
composables.summary: Base avatar container (slot overload): fill content with an Image, Icon, or text, centered on a circular tinted surface.

params.name: modifier
params.description: the Modifier applied to the avatar.

params.name: size
params.description: the avatar diameter (defaults to FormaAvatarSize.Medium).

params.name: shape
params.description: the clip shape (defaults to FormaAvatarDefaults.shape, a full circle).

params.name: containerColor
params.description: the background color (defaults to the M3 primaryContainer).

params.name: contentColor
params.description: the color applied to icon/text content (defaults to M3 onPrimaryContainer).

params.name: content
params.description: the centered content (an Image, Icon, or text).

composables.name: FormaAvatar
composables.summary: Initials overload — the standard fallback when a user has no profile image.

params.name: initials
params.description: the initials to display (typically 1–2 characters).

params.name: modifier
params.description: the Modifier applied to the avatar.

params.name: size
params.description: the avatar diameter (defaults to FormaAvatarSize.Medium).

params.name: shape
params.description: the clip shape (defaults to FormaAvatarDefaults.shape, a full circle).

params.name: containerColor
params.description: the background color (defaults to the M3 primaryContainer).

params.name: contentColor
params.description: the initials color (defaults to M3 onPrimaryContainer).

params.name: textStyle
params.description: the initials TextStyle (defaults to FormaAvatarDefaults.textStyle for size, which keeps the type at roughly 35–40% of the avatar diameter).

supportingApi.name: FormaAvatarSize
supportingApi.summary: Avatar diameter: Small (32dp), Medium (40dp), Large (56dp); exposes a dp property.

supportingApi.name: FormaAvatarDefaults
supportingApi.summary: Default values for FormaAvatar; shape returns FormaTheme.shapes.full (circular); textStyle(size) maps the avatar size to the theme type scale (Small → labelMedium, Medium → titleSmall, Large → titleLarge, roughly 35–40% of the diameter).

accessibility: The container is decorative and non-interactive; wrap it in a clickable/Modifier.semantics parent (with the person's name as the description) when it represents a tappable user.

name: Divider
description: A FormaUI divider — a thin rule for separating content, delegating to Material 3's HorizontalDivider / VerticalDivider.

composables.name: FormaDivider
composables.summary: Thin horizontal or vertical rule for separating content, chosen by the orientation parameter.

params.name: modifier
params.description: the Modifier applied to the divider.

params.name: orientation
params.description: whether the rule runs horizontally or vertically (defaults to FormaDividerOrientation.Horizontal).

params.name: thickness
params.description: the stroke thickness (defaults to Material 3's hairline DividerDefaults.Thickness).

params.name: color
params.description: the stroke color (defaults to Material 3's DividerDefaults.color).

supportingApi.name: FormaDividerOrientation
supportingApi.summary: The direction the divider runs: Horizontal, Vertical.

accessibility: Purely decorative: a divider carries no semantics and does not need a content description.

name: LoadingIndicator
description: A FormaUI loading indicator — circular or linear, determinate or indeterminate — delegating to Material 3's progress indicators.

composables.name: FormaLoadingIndicator
composables.summary: Circular or linear progress indicator; indeterminate when progress is null, determinate for a 0f..1f fraction.

params.name: modifier
params.description: the Modifier applied to the indicator.

params.name: variant
params.description: circular or linear (defaults to FormaLoadingIndicatorVariant.Circular).

params.name: progress
params.description: the completion fraction 0f..1f, or null for an indeterminate indicator.

params.name: contentDescription
params.description: optional accessibility description of what is loading.

supportingApi.name: FormaLoadingIndicatorVariant
supportingApi.summary: The indicator's shape: Circular, Linear.

accessibility: Supply contentDescription (e.g. "Loading transactions") so screen readers announce the busy state; a bare indicator is otherwise silent.

name: EmptyState
description: A FormaUI empty state — the centered "nothing here yet / no results" placeholder with an optional illustration, a title, a description, and an optional action.

composables.name: FormaEmptyState
composables.summary: Centered empty-state placeholder composed from FormaUI tokens (no Material 3 equivalent); only title is required.

params.name: title
params.description: the primary message (required).

params.name: modifier
params.description: the Modifier applied to the empty state.

params.name: description
params.description: optional secondary explanatory text.

params.name: icon
params.description: optional illustration/icon slot shown above the title.

params.name: action
params.description: optional action slot shown below the text (typically a FormaButton).

codeSample:
FormaEmptyState(
    title = "No transactions yet",
    description = "Your transactions will appear here once you make your first payment.",
    icon = { Icon(Icons.Outlined.Receipt, contentDescription = null) },
    action = { FormaButton(onClick = { /* add payment */ }) { Text("Add payment") } },
)

name: Snackbar
description: A FormaUI snackbar — a brief, transient message at the bottom of the screen, delegating to Material 3's Snackbar, with a standard (message-only) and an action variant.

composables.name: FormaSnackbar
composables.summary: Renders the snackbar visual directly; the action button is shown only when both actionLabel and onAction are provided.

params.name: message
params.description: the text to display.

params.name: modifier
params.description: the Modifier applied to the snackbar.

params.name: actionLabel
params.description: optional action button label; the action is shown only when both this and onAction are provided.

params.name: onAction
params.description: optional action callback.

params.name: shape
params.description: the snackbar container shape (defaults to FormaSnackbarDefaults.shape).

composables.name: FormaSnackbarHost
composables.summary: Hosts snackbars queued through a SnackbarHostState, rendering each as a FormaUI-styled FormaSnackbar (including its action button); place it in a Scaffold's snackbarHost slot.

params.name: hostState
params.description: the SnackbarHostState whose current message is displayed.

params.name: modifier
params.description: the Modifier applied to the host.

supportingApi.name: FormaSnackbarDefaults
supportingApi.summary: Default values used by FormaSnackbar; exposes shape (FormaUI's md corner tier).

name: Slider
description: A FormaUI slider — lets the user select a value from a continuous or stepped range, delegating to Material 3's Slider.

composables.name: FormaSlider
composables.summary: Stateless slider with hoisted state: the caller owns value and updates it in onValueChange; set steps to snap to discrete stops within valueRange.

params.name: value
params.description: the current value; should sit within valueRange.

params.name: onValueChange
params.description: called continuously with the new value as the user drags.

params.name: modifier
params.description: the Modifier applied to the slider.

params.name: enabled
params.description: whether the slider is interactive.

params.name: valueRange
params.description: the inclusive range of selectable values (defaults to 0f..1f).

params.name: steps
params.description: the number of discrete intermediate stops (0 = continuous).

params.name: onValueChangeFinished
params.description: called once when the user finishes changing the value.

params.name: colors
params.description: the slider colors (defaults to the M3 defaults, themed by FormaTheme).

accessibility: Exposes a 48dp touch target via Material 3's minimum interactive component size.

name: BottomAppBar
description: A FormaUI bottom app bar — navigation and key actions anchored to the bottom of small screens, delegating to Material 3's BottomAppBar.

composables.name: FormaBottomAppBar
composables.summary: Bottom bar of icon actions with an optional embedded FAB at the end.

params.name: actions
params.description: the bar's icon content, laid out in a RowScope (typically IconButtons).

params.name: modifier
params.description: the Modifier applied to the bar.

params.name: floatingActionButton
params.description: optional FAB embedded at the end of the bar (typically a FormaFloatingActionButton).

params.name: containerColor
params.description: the background color of the bar.

params.name: contentColor
params.description: the preferred content color, derived from containerColor by default.

supportingApi.name: FormaBottomAppBarDefaults
supportingApi.summary: Default values used by FormaBottomAppBar; exposes the default containerColor.

name: DropdownMenu
description: A FormaUI dropdown menu — a transient surface of choices anchored to a control, delegating to Material 3's DropdownMenu.

composables.name: FormaDropdownMenu
composables.summary: Popup menu anchored to a sibling control; visibility is hoisted via expanded/onDismissRequest.

params.name: expanded
params.description: whether the menu is currently shown.

params.name: onDismissRequest
params.description: called when the user requests to dismiss the menu — an outside tap or the back gesture.

params.name: modifier
params.description: the Modifier applied to the menu's content.

params.name: content
params.description: the menu's items, laid out in a scrollable ColumnScope (typically FormaDropdownMenuItems).

composables.name: FormaDropdownMenuItem
composables.summary: A single choice in a FormaDropdownMenu, delegating to Material 3's DropdownMenuItem.

params.name: text
params.description: the item's label.

params.name: onClick
params.description: called when the item is clicked. Not invoked while enabled is false. Callers typically also dismiss the menu from here.

params.name: modifier
params.description: the Modifier applied to the item.

params.name: leadingIcon
params.description: optional slot at the start of the item.

params.name: trailingIcon
params.description: optional slot at the end of the item (can also hold Text for a keyboard shortcut hint).

params.name: enabled
params.description: whether the item is interactive.

name: FloatingActionButton
description: A FormaUI floating action button — "Material 3 with better defaults"; one entry point covers all three Material 3 FAB sizes via size, with a default-on press-scale micro-interaction (shared Modifier.formaPressScale) on both FAB composables.

composables.name: FormaFloatingActionButton
composables.summary: The screen's primary action, in Small/Regular/Large sizes; corners default to FormaUI's xl tier for a consistent silhouette across sizes.

params.name: onClick
params.description: called when the FAB is clicked.

params.name: modifier
params.description: the Modifier applied to the FAB.

params.name: size
params.description: the FAB's size (defaults to FormaFabSize.Regular).

params.name: shape
params.description: the FAB's container shape (defaults to FormaFabDefaults.shape).

params.name: containerColor
params.description: the background color of the FAB.

params.name: contentColor
params.description: the preferred content color, derived from containerColor by default.

params.name: interactionSource
params.description: the MutableInteractionSource for observing/emitting interactions. When null, one is remembered internally.

params.name: pressedScale
params.description: the scale factor applied while the FAB is pressed (defaults to a subtle 0.97). Must be greater than 0.

params.name: pressAnimationSpec
params.description: the animation used for the press-scale's release spring-back (defaults to a responsive spring; the press dip uses FormaPressScaleDefaults.DownAnimationSpec). Pass null to disable the press-scale entirely.

params.name: content
params.description: the FAB's content, typically a single Icon.

composables.name: FormaExtendedFloatingActionButton
composables.summary: A wider FAB pairing an icon with a text label; set expanded = false to collapse down to just the icon, with the width animating between states.

params.name: text
params.description: the FAB's text label.

params.name: icon
params.description: the FAB's leading icon.

params.name: onClick
params.description: called when the FAB is clicked.

params.name: modifier
params.description: the Modifier applied to the FAB.

params.name: expanded
params.description: whether the FAB shows both icon and text (true) or collapses to just icon (false).

params.name: shape
params.description: the FAB's container shape (defaults to FormaFabDefaults.shape).

params.name: containerColor
params.description: the background color of the FAB.

params.name: contentColor
params.description: the preferred content color, derived from containerColor by default.

params.name: interactionSource
params.description: the MutableInteractionSource for observing/emitting interactions. When null, one is remembered internally.

params.name: pressedScale
params.description: the scale factor applied while the FAB is pressed (defaults to a subtle 0.97). Must be greater than 0.

params.name: pressAnimationSpec
params.description: the animation used for the press-scale's release spring-back (defaults to a responsive spring; the press dip uses FormaPressScaleDefaults.DownAnimationSpec). Pass null to disable the press-scale entirely.

supportingApi.name: FormaFabSize
supportingApi.summary: The size of a FormaFloatingActionButton, mirroring Material 3's three FAB sizes: Small, Regular, Large.

supportingApi.name: FormaFabDefaults
supportingApi.summary: Default values used by both FAB composables; exposes shape (FormaUI's xl corner tier, used across all sizes).

name: IconButton
description: A FormaUI icon button — "Material 3 with better defaults"; one entry point covers all four Material 3 icon button variants via variant, with a default-on press-scale micro-interaction (shared Modifier.formaPressScale) using a deeper 0.92 dip.

composables.name: FormaIconButton
composables.summary: One entry point for all four M3 icon button variants via variant; supply the content slot yourself, typically an Icon with a contentDescription.

params.name: onClick
params.description: called when the button is clicked. Not invoked while enabled is false.

params.name: modifier
params.description: the Modifier applied to the button.

params.name: variant
params.description: the visual emphasis (defaults to FormaIconButtonVariant.Standard).

params.name: enabled
params.description: whether the button is interactive.

params.name: colors
params.description: the container/content colors. When null, the Material 3 default colors for the chosen variant are used.

params.name: interactionSource
params.description: the MutableInteractionSource for observing/emitting interactions. When null, one is remembered internally.

params.name: pressedScale
params.description: the scale factor applied while the button is pressed (defaults to a deeper 0.92 — small targets need a larger relative dip to read). Must be greater than 0.

params.name: pressAnimationSpec
params.description: the animation used for the press-scale's release spring-back (defaults to a responsive spring; the press dip uses FormaPressScaleDefaults.DownAnimationSpec). Pass null to disable the press-scale entirely.

params.name: content
params.description: the button's content — typically a single Icon with a contentDescription.

supportingApi.name: FormaIconButtonVariant
supportingApi.summary: The visual emphasis of a FormaIconButton, mirroring Material 3's four icon button variants: Standard, Filled, Tonal, Outlined.

supportingApi.name: FormaIconButtonDefaults
supportingApi.summary: Defaults for FormaIconButton: PressedScale (0.92 — a deeper press-scale dip than larger controls, so the feedback reads at icon size).

accessibility: 48dp minimum touch target and Role.Button semantics inherited from the underlying Material 3 icon button; content should be an Icon with a contentDescription since the button carries no text label of its own.

name: NavigationDrawer
description: A FormaUI modal navigation drawer — an off-canvas panel of destinations that slides in over content and is dismissed with a scrim tap, delegating to Material 3's ModalNavigationDrawer.

composables.name: FormaModalNavigationDrawer
composables.summary: Modal drawer that auto-wraps drawerContent in a ModalDrawerSheet; open/closed state is hoisted via DrawerState.

params.name: drawerState
params.description: the drawer's hoisted open/closed state (e.g. rememberDrawerState(DrawerValue.Closed)).

params.name: drawerContent
params.description: the drawer's items, laid out in a ColumnScope inside a ModalDrawerSheet (typically FormaNavigationDrawerItems).

params.name: modifier
params.description: the Modifier applied to the drawer.

params.name: gesturesEnabled
params.description: whether the drawer can be opened/closed by a swipe gesture.

params.name: content
params.description: the screen content behind the drawer.

composables.name: FormaNavigationDrawerItem
composables.summary: A single destination row in the drawer, with optional leading icon and trailing text badge (e.g. an unread count).

params.name: label
params.description: the item's text label.

params.name: selected
params.description: whether this item is the current destination.

params.name: onClick
params.description: called when the item is tapped.

params.name: modifier
params.description: the Modifier applied to the item.

params.name: icon
params.description: optional leading icon (supply a contentDescription on it for accessibility).

params.name: badge
params.description: optional trailing text (e.g. an unread count) shown at the item's end.

accessibility: Item icons should carry a contentDescription for accessibility (noted on the icon param); dismissible via scrim tap and (when gesturesEnabled) swipe.

name: NavigationRail
description: A FormaUI navigation rail — top-level destination switching for tablet/desktop-width screens, delegating to Material 3's NavigationRail.

composables.name: FormaNavigationRail
composables.summary: Vertical rail pinned to the start edge, with an optional header slot (typically a FAB or logo) above the items.

params.name: modifier
params.description: the Modifier applied to the rail.

params.name: header
params.description: optional content shown above the items (typically a FAB or a logo).

params.name: content
params.description: the rail's items, laid out in a ColumnScope (typically 3-7 FormaNavigationRailItems).

composables.name: FormaNavigationRailItem
composables.summary: A single rail destination with built-in per-item badge support (numeric badgeCount or dot via showBadgeDot); takes no scope receiver.

params.name: selected
params.description: whether this item is the current destination.

params.name: onClick
params.description: called when the item is tapped.

params.name: icon
params.description: the item's icon (supply a contentDescription on it for accessibility).

params.name: modifier
params.description: the Modifier applied to the item.

params.name: label
params.description: optional text label shown under the icon.

params.name: enabled
params.description: whether the item is interactive.

params.name: badgeCount
params.description: optional unread count to show as a numeric badge on the icon.

params.name: showBadgeDot
params.description: when true and badgeCount is null, shows a dot badge on the icon.

params.name: alwaysShowLabel
params.description: whether the label is shown even when the item is unselected.

accessibility: 48dp touch target and selection semantics come from Material 3's NavigationRailItem; supply a contentDescription on each item's icon.

name: SearchBar
description: A FormaUI search bar — "Material 3 with better defaults", wrapping Material 3's SearchBar/DockedSearchBar behind one entry point whose variant switches between the docked and full-screen expansion surfaces.

composables.name: FormaSearchBar
composables.summary: Search input that expands into a Docked results panel or a FullScreen overlay; query and expansion state are both hoisted.

params.name: query
params.description: the current query text shown in the input field.

params.name: onQueryChange
params.description: called with the updated text as the user types.

params.name: onSearch
params.description: called with the current query when the input service triggers the search (IME) action.

params.name: expanded
params.description: whether the search bar is expanded and showing content.

params.name: onExpandedChange
params.description: called with the requested new expanded state — e.g. true when the input field gains focus, false on dismiss request or back navigation.

params.name: modifier
params.description: the Modifier applied to the search bar in its collapsed layout position.

params.name: variant
params.description: which Material 3 surface to expand into (defaults to FormaSearchBarVariant.Docked).

params.name: enabled
params.description: whether the input field is interactive.

params.name: placeholder
params.description: the placeholder shown in the input field when query is empty.

params.name: leadingIcon
params.description: the input field's leading icon slot, typically a search glyph.

params.name: trailingIcon
params.description: the input field's trailing icon slot, e.g. a clear button shown when query is not empty.

params.name: shape
params.description: the collapsed search bar's container shape. When null, the Material 3 default for the chosen variant is used (FormaSearchBarDefaults.dockedShape or FormaSearchBarDefaults.fullScreenCollapsedShape).

params.name: colors
params.description: the container/divider/input-field colors. When null, the Material 3 default colors are used.

params.name: tonalElevation
params.description: the tonal elevation applied when colors' container color is the surface color (defaults to FormaSearchBarDefaults.TonalElevation).

params.name: shadowElevation
params.description: the shadow elevation below the collapsed search bar (defaults to FormaSearchBarDefaults.ShadowElevation).

params.name: interactionSource
params.description: the MutableInteractionSource for observing/emitting interactions on the input field. When null, one is remembered internally.

params.name: content
params.description: the search results (or suggestions) shown below the input field while expanded, laid out in a ColumnScope.

supportingApi.name: FormaSearchBarVariant
supportingApi.summary: The surface the search bar expands into; values: Docked, FullScreen.

supportingApi.name: FormaSearchBarDefaults
supportingApi.summary: Default values: dockedShape, fullScreenCollapsedShape, TonalElevation, ShadowElevation.

name: SegmentedButton
description: A FormaUI segmented button row — a set of connected, mutually-styled buttons for view switching or option selection, delegating to Material 3's SingleChoiceSegmentedButtonRow / MultiChoiceSegmentedButtonRow.

composables.name: FormaSegmentedButtonRow
composables.summary: One entry point for both Material 3 selection modes: multiSelect = false for single-choice, true for per-segment toggles.

params.name: multiSelect
params.description: false for mutually-exclusive (single-choice) selection, true for independent per-segment toggles (multi-choice).

params.name: modifier
params.description: the Modifier applied to the row.

params.name: content
params.description: the row's segments, typically FormaSegmentedButtons.

composables.name: FormaSegmentedButton
composables.summary: Single-choice segment (RadioButton semantics) — extension on FormaSegmentedButtonRowScope; use in rows with multiSelect = false.

params.name: selected
params.description: whether this segment is the currently selected one.

params.name: onClick
params.description: called when the segment is clicked. Not invoked while enabled is false.

params.name: index
params.description: this segment's position within the row (0-based) — used to compute the correct start/middle/end corner shape.

params.name: count
params.description: the total number of segments in the row — used to compute the correct start/middle/end corner shape.

params.name: modifier
params.description: the Modifier applied to the segment.

params.name: enabled
params.description: whether the segment is interactive.

params.name: icon
params.description: the segment's leading icon slot. Defaults to Material 3's crossfading checkmark, shown only while selected.

params.name: label
params.description: the segment's content, typically a Text.

composables.name: FormaSegmentedButton
composables.summary: Multi-choice segment (independent toggle semantics) — extension on FormaSegmentedButtonRowScope; use in rows with multiSelect = true.

params.name: checked
params.description: whether this segment is currently checked.

params.name: onCheckedChange
params.description: called with the requested new checked state when the segment is clicked. Not invoked while enabled is false.

params.name: index
params.description: this segment's position within the row (0-based) — used to compute the correct start/middle/end corner shape.

params.name: count
params.description: the total number of segments in the row — used to compute the correct start/middle/end corner shape.

params.name: modifier
params.description: the Modifier applied to the segment.

params.name: enabled
params.description: whether the segment is interactive.

params.name: icon
params.description: the segment's leading icon slot. Defaults to Material 3's crossfading checkmark, shown only while checked.

params.name: label
params.description: the segment's content, typically a Text.

supportingApi.name: FormaSegmentedButtonRowScope
supportingApi.summary: Interface (scope) extending both SingleChoiceSegmentedButtonRowScope and MultiChoiceSegmentedButtonRowScope so one content lambda type serves both selection modes.

accessibility: Single-select segments carry RadioButton semantics and multi-select segments carry toggle semantics, via the correctly-scoped Material 3 SegmentedButton overloads.

name: TabRow
description: A FormaUI tab row — switches between a small number of related content destinations, delegating to Material 3's PrimaryTabRow/SecondaryTabRow (or their scrollable equivalents).

composables.name: FormaTabRow
composables.summary: Stateless tab row covering both indicator emphases (variant) and fixed vs. scrollable layout (scrollable) in one entry point.

params.name: selectedTabIndex
params.description: the index of the currently selected tab, used to position the active indicator.

params.name: modifier
params.description: the Modifier applied to the row.

params.name: variant
params.description: the indicator style (defaults to FormaTabRowVariant.Primary).

params.name: scrollable
params.description: when true, tabs are laid out from the start edge and scroll if they overflow — use this for a large or dynamic number of tabs. When false (the default), tabs are fixed and evenly spaced across the row's width — use this for a small, stable set of tabs.

params.name: tabs
params.description: the row's tabs, typically FormaTabs.

composables.name: FormaTab
composables.summary: A single tab; delegates to Material 3's Tab, or to LeadingIconTab automatically when both text and icon are supplied.

params.name: selected
params.description: whether this tab is the currently active destination.

params.name: onClick
params.description: called when the tab is clicked. Not invoked while enabled is false.

params.name: modifier
params.description: the Modifier applied to the tab.

params.name: text
params.description: optional text label.

params.name: icon
params.description: optional icon. Should be 24dp.

params.name: enabled
params.description: whether the tab is interactive.

params.name: selectedContentColor
params.description: the color for the tab's content (and its ripple) when selected. When null, LocalContentColor is used.

params.name: unselectedContentColor
params.description: the color for the tab's content when not selected. When null, defaults to selectedContentColor.

params.name: interactionSource
params.description: the MutableInteractionSource for observing/emitting interactions. When null, one is remembered internally.

supportingApi.name: FormaTabRowVariant
supportingApi.summary: Indicator style; values: Primary (bold pill indicator, top-level navigation), Secondary (slim underline, views within one destination).

name: Tooltip
description: A FormaUI tooltip — "Material 3 with better defaults", wrapping Material 3's TooltipBox + PlainTooltip/RichTooltip.

composables.name: FormaTooltip
composables.summary: Tooltip anchored to its content slot, triggered on long-press/hover; Plain or Rich (title + action) via variant, caret on by default.

params.name: text
params.description: the tooltip's message.

params.name: modifier
params.description: the Modifier applied to the anchor (content).

params.name: variant
params.description: the tooltip surface (defaults to FormaTooltipVariant.Plain).

params.name: state
params.description: hoisted visibility state; controls and reports whether the tooltip is currently shown (defaults to a freshly remembered, non-persistent TooltipState).

params.name: title
params.description: an optional title shown above text. Only used when variant is FormaTooltipVariant.Rich; ignored for FormaTooltipVariant.Plain.

params.name: action
params.description: an optional action (typically a TextButton) shown below text. Only used when variant is FormaTooltipVariant.Rich; ignored for Plain. When non-null, the tooltip becomes persistent-friendly: Material 3 keeps it focusable so accessibility services can reach the action.

params.name: showCaret
params.description: whether a caret pointing at the anchor is drawn on the tooltip container. FormaUI defaults this to true (Material 3's own default is no caret) since it makes the anchor relationship unambiguous.

params.name: positionProvider
params.description: controls where the tooltip is placed relative to content. When null, it is placed above the anchor via TooltipDefaults.rememberTooltipPositionProvider.

params.name: onDismissRequest
params.description: called when the user clicks outside the tooltip while it is shown. When null, Material 3's default dismiss-on-outside-click behavior applies.

params.name: enableUserInput
params.description: whether long-press and hover on content trigger the tooltip through state. Set to false if you drive state entirely programmatically.

params.name: colors
params.description: the container/content/title/action colors used by FormaTooltipVariant.Rich. When null, the Material 3 default rich tooltip colors are used. Has no effect on FormaTooltipVariant.Plain.

params.name: content
params.description: the anchor content that the tooltip attaches to.

supportingApi.name: FormaTooltipVariant
supportingApi.summary: Visual weight; values: Plain (single line of supporting text), Rich (larger surface with optional title and action).

supportingApi.name: FormaTooltipDefaults
supportingApi.summary: Default values: caretShape, plainMaxWidth, richMaxWidth.

accessibility: When a Rich tooltip has a non-null action, Material 3 keeps the tooltip focusable so accessibility services can reach the action; triggered by long-press or hover on the anchor.

name: TopAppBar
description: A FormaUI top app bar — "Material 3 with better defaults"; one entry point covers all four Material 3 top app bar sizes via variant.

composables.name: FormaTopAppBar
composables.summary: One entry point for all four M3 top app bar sizes via variant; pair Medium/Large with a scrollBehavior for the standard collapsing-header behavior (call sites also need @OptIn(ExperimentalMaterial3Api::class) because TopAppBarScrollBehavior is still experimental in M3).

params.name: title
params.description: the bar's title text.

params.name: modifier
params.description: the Modifier applied to the bar.

params.name: variant
params.description: the bar's layout (defaults to FormaTopAppBarVariant.Small).

params.name: navigationIcon
params.description: optional slot at the start of the bar (typically an IconButton, e.g. FormaIconButton, for a back or menu action).

params.name: actions
params.description: the actions displayed at the end of the bar, laid out in a RowScope (typically IconButtons).

params.name: scrollBehavior
params.description: an optional TopAppBarScrollBehavior that ties this bar's height/color changes to a scrolling content's NestedScrollConnection.

params.name: colors
params.description: the container/content colors. When null, the Material 3 default colors for the chosen variant are used.

supportingApi.name: FormaTopAppBarVariant
supportingApi.summary: The layout of a FormaTopAppBar, mirroring Material 3's four top app bar sizes: Small, CenterAligned, Medium, Large.

name: BarChart
description: A FormaUI bar chart — vertical bars with rounded top corners, drawn with pure Compose Canvas (no chart-library dependency); gridlines, category labels, value labels, and a one-shot entry animation are all built in.

composables.name: FormaBarChart
composables.summary: Vertical rounded bars scaled against a "nice" auto-computed (or explicit) y-axis maximum, with optional gridlines, category labels, value labels, and an entry animation; exposes an auto-generated data summary as its content description.

params.name: entries
params.description: the data to plot, one bar per entry, in order. Values must be finite and non-negative. An empty list renders an empty (but described) chart area.

params.name: modifier
params.description: the Modifier applied to the chart (it fills the available width at a minimum height of FormaChartDefaults.MinChartHeight).

params.name: barColor
params.description: the fill color for all bars (defaults to the theme's primary). A FormaChartEntry.color that is specified overrides this for that bar.

params.name: maxValue
params.description: the value the y-axis tops out at. When null, a "nice" rounded maximum is computed from the data. Must be finite and positive when supplied; values above it are clipped to the top of the plot.

params.name: showValueLabels
params.description: whether to draw each bar's formatted value above it. Labels use FormaChartDefaults.valueLabelStyle (tabular figures).

params.name: showCategoryLabels
params.description: whether to draw each entry's label below its bar. Labels use FormaChartDefaults.axisLabelStyle, centered per bar and ellipsized to the bar's slot width.

params.name: showGridLines
params.description: whether to draw horizontal gridlines dividing the plot into FormaChartDefaults.GridLineCount bands, in FormaChartDefaults.gridLineColor.

params.name: barCornerRadius
params.description: the radius of each bar's top corners (defaults to 4dp).

params.name: valueFormatter
params.description: formats a value for value labels and the auto-generated accessibility summary.

params.name: animationSpec
params.description: the entry animation for bar growth, or null to render a static final frame (deterministic in tests and screenshots).

params.name: contentDescription
params.description: an explicit accessibility description; when null a summary of the data is generated automatically.

supportingApi.name: FormaChartEntry
supportingApi.summary: One data point shared by all FormaUI charts (label, value, optional explicit color). Charts are stateless and redraw when the caller passes a structurally different list — an equal-but-new list never replays the entry animation.

supportingApi.name: FormaChartDefaults
supportingApi.summary: Defaults shared by all FormaUI charts: MinChartHeight (180dp), MinDonutSize (160dp), DonutStrokeWidth (24dp), LineStrokeWidth (2dp), LinePointRadius (3dp), BarCornerRadius (4dp), LegendSwatchSize (12dp), GridLineCount (4), seriesColors (a six-color M3 palette with error last), gridLineColor, valueLabelStyle (tabular figures), axisLabelStyle, ValueFormatter, and EntryAnimationSpec (an 800ms tween).

supportingApi.name: FormaChartLegend
supportingApi.summary: A wrapping row of color swatches and labels, one item per FormaChartEntry. Charts never embed a legend — place one next to the chart with the same entries (and, for a donut, the same palette) so swatches resolve to the chart's colors; an optional valueFormatter appends each entry's formatted value. Labels are real Text, so the legend is natively accessible.

codeSample:
FormaBarChart(
    entries = listOf(
        FormaChartEntry("Jan", 12f),
        FormaChartEntry("Feb", 32f),
        FormaChartEntry("Mar", 21f),
    ),
    showValueLabels = true,
)
accessibility: Exposes an auto-generated data summary (e.g. "Bar chart with 3 categories. Jan: 12. …") as its semantics content description — override with contentDescription; empty entries describe themselves as "Bar chart with no data".

name: DonutChart
description: A FormaUI donut chart — proportional stroked arc segments around an open center slot, drawn with pure Compose Canvas (no chart-library dependency); segments cycle the shared series palette and sweep in clockwise on entry.

composables.name: FormaDonutChart
composables.summary: Proportional arc segments separated by small gaps around an open center, cycling FormaChartDefaults.seriesColors, with a centerContent slot (e.g. a total) and an auto-generated percentage summary as its content description; empty or all-zero data draws a neutral track ring instead of crashing.

params.name: entries
params.description: the data to plot, one segment per entry, clockwise in order. Values must be finite and non-negative; each segment's sweep is proportional to its share of the total.

params.name: modifier
params.description: the Modifier applied to the chart. It keeps a 1:1 aspect ratio at a minimum size of FormaChartDefaults.MinDonutSize; size it explicitly (e.g. Modifier.size(200.dp)).

params.name: segmentColors
params.description: the palette cycled for segments whose entry has no explicit FormaChartEntry.color; null uses FormaChartDefaults.seriesColors.

params.name: strokeWidth
params.description: the thickness of the donut's ring (defaults to 24dp).

params.name: strokeCap
params.description: the cap style for each segment's ends: StrokeCap.Round (the default) gives softly rounded ends, insetting each drawn arc by the caps' angular overhang so gaps stay visible and segments land on their true bounds (a segment too small to fit its two caps renders as a dot); StrokeCap.Butt gives flat, squared ends. Irrelevant on a closed ring (a lone visible segment, or the zero-total track ring).

params.name: startAngle
params.description: the angle the first segment starts at, in degrees clockwise from 3 o'clock; the default starts at 12 o'clock.

params.name: segmentGapDegrees
params.description: the angular gap between adjacent segments, in degrees. Ignored when only one segment is visible. Must be finite and non-negative.

params.name: animationSpec
params.description: the entry animation for the clockwise reveal, or null to render a static final frame.

params.name: contentDescription
params.description: an explicit accessibility description; when null a percentage summary of the data is generated automatically.

params.name: centerContent
params.description: a slot composed in the donut's center hole (e.g. a total or a caption). Centered but not clipped, so keep it smaller than the hole; its semantics stay independently accessible next to the chart summary.

supportingApi.name: FormaChartEntry
supportingApi.summary: The shared chart data point — see the bar-chart entry for the full shared chart API (FormaChartEntry, FormaChartDefaults, FormaChartLegend).

codeSample:
FormaDonutChart(
    entries = listOf(
        FormaChartEntry("Rent", 850f),
        FormaChartEntry("Groceries", 420f),
        FormaChartEntry("Transport", 210f),
    ),
    centerContent = { Text("1480") },
)
accessibility: Exposes an auto-generated integer-percentage summary (e.g. "Donut chart with 3 segments. Rent: 57 percent. …") as its semantics content description — override with contentDescription; empty entries describe themselves as "Donut chart with no data", and the centerContent slot's semantics stay independently accessible.

name: LineChart
description: A FormaUI line chart — a single series plotted as a smooth (or straight) trend line with an optional area fill, point markers, gridlines, and x-axis labels, drawn with pure Compose Canvas (no chart-library dependency). Accepts negative values.

composables.name: FormaLineChart
composables.summary: Plots a List<Float> as a trend line: smooth horizontally-clamped cubic curves (no vertical overshoot) or straight segments, a gradient area fill, optional point markers and x labels, and a leading-edge sweep entry animation; degenerate data (empty, single point, flat series) renders gracefully.

params.name: values
params.description: the series to plot, in order, spread evenly across the width. Values must be finite (negative values are allowed). An empty list renders an empty (but described) chart area.

params.name: modifier
params.description: the Modifier applied to the chart (it fills the available width at a minimum height of FormaChartDefaults.MinChartHeight).

params.name: lineColor
params.description: the color of the line, its points, and the area fill (defaults to the theme's primary).

params.name: strokeWidth
params.description: the thickness of the line (defaults to 2dp).

params.name: minValue
params.description: the value the y-axis bottoms out at. When null, the data's own minimum is used. Must be finite when supplied; values below it are clipped to the plot's bottom edge.

params.name: maxValue
params.description: the value the y-axis tops out at. When null, the data's own maximum is used. Must be finite (and greater than minValue when both are supplied); values above it are clipped to the plot's top edge.

params.name: smooth
params.description: whether segments are smoothed cubic curves or straight polyline segments. Smoothing clamps control points horizontally to the midpoint between neighboring x positions, so the curve never overshoots a value vertically.

params.name: fillArea
params.description: whether to fill the area under the line with a vertical gradient of lineColor fading to transparent at the plot floor.

params.name: showPoints
params.description: whether to draw a FormaChartDefaults.LinePointRadius circle marker at each data point. A single-value dataset always draws its point (there is no segment to draw).

params.name: showGridLines
params.description: whether to draw horizontal gridlines dividing the plot into FormaChartDefaults.GridLineCount bands, in FormaChartDefaults.gridLineColor.

params.name: xLabels
params.description: optional x-axis labels drawn under the plot in FormaChartDefaults.axisLabelStyle, paired index-by-index with values and centered under their points; labels beyond the point count are ignored. Empty reserves no label band.

params.name: valueFormatter
params.description: formats a value for the auto-generated accessibility summary.

params.name: animationSpec
params.description: the entry animation for the leading-edge sweep, or null to render a static final frame.

params.name: contentDescription
params.description: an explicit accessibility description; when null a summary of the data is generated automatically.

supportingApi.name: FormaChartDefaults
supportingApi.summary: Shared chart defaults (LineStrokeWidth, LinePointRadius, GridLineCount, EntryAnimationSpec, ValueFormatter, …) — see the bar-chart entry for the full shared chart API.

codeSample:
FormaLineChart(
    values = listOf(4f, 9f, 6f, 14f, 11f),
    showPoints = true,
    xLabels = listOf("Mon", "Tue", "Wed", "Thu", "Fri"),
)
accessibility: Exposes an auto-generated summary of point count, min–max range, and latest value (e.g. "Line chart with 5 points. Range 4 to 14. Latest value 11.") as its semantics content description — override with contentDescription; empty values describe themselves as "Line chart with no data".

name: DatePickerSheet
description: A FormaUI date picker presented in a modal bottom sheet — Material 3's inline DatePicker hosted in a FormaBottomSheet instead of the M3 DatePickerDialog, with hoisted M3 state, confirm/dismiss button slots, and the calendar-to-text-input mode toggle.

composables.name: FormaDatePickerSheet
composables.summary: Hosts M3's stable DatePicker in a FormaBottomSheet above an end-aligned button row. State is the caller's DatePickerState and the component wires nothing to the button slots — the confirm slot reads state.selectedDateMillis itself (so it can disable itself until a date is picked). The default colors make the picker's own container transparent so it sits directly on the sheet surface.

params.name: onDismissRequest
params.description: called when the sheet is dismissed (scrim tap, back press, or swipe down) — hide the sheet by no longer composing it. There is no separate cancel callback; treat a dismiss as closed-without-confirming.

params.name: state
params.description: the hoisted Material 3 state; create it with rememberDatePickerState. Read state.selectedDateMillis (UTC epoch millis, Long?) in the confirm slot's click handler. The picker's locale is captured when the state is created (Material 3 behavior).

params.name: confirmButton
params.description: the primary action slot (required), typically a FormaButton. The component attaches no click handling or label — the slot owns both.

params.name: modifier
params.description: the Modifier applied to the sheet.

params.name: dismissButton
params.description: the optional secondary/cancel action slot, shown before confirmButton.

params.name: showModeToggle
params.description: whether the picker shows Material 3's calendar-to-text-input mode toggle.

params.name: skipPartiallyExpanded
params.description: whether the sheet skips the half-expanded state and opens fully. Defaults to true — deliberately unlike FormaBottomSheet — because the half-expanded state clips the calendar grid.

params.name: shape
params.description: the sheet container shape. When null, Material 3's top-rounded default is used.

params.name: colors
params.description: the DatePickerColors for the picker. When null, Material 3's defaults are used with a transparent picker container so the picker sits directly on the sheet surface (avoiding a container-on-container seam). A supplied value is passed through untouched.

supportingApi.name: rememberDatePickerState
supportingApi.summary: The component defines no state type of its own — callers create and own the picker state via Material 3's rememberDatePickerState (initial date, selectableDates, yearRange, initialDisplayMode, saveability) and read selectedDateMillis from it.

variants: Text-input mode (initialDisplayMode or the mode toggle)
accessibility: Inherits Material 3's DatePicker semantics — day cells expose full-date content descriptions, the mode toggle has its own content description, and navigation controls are labeled — plus ModalBottomSheet's back-press and scrim dismiss handling; the button slots are caller-supplied (typically FormaButtons with M3's 48dp minimum touch target).

name: DateRangePickerSheet
description: A FormaUI date-range picker presented in a modal bottom sheet — Material 3's inline DateRangePicker hosted in a FormaBottomSheet instead of the M3 DatePickerDialog, with hoisted M3 state, confirm/dismiss button slots, and the calendar-to-text-input mode toggle. The picker's scrollable month list is bounded by the sheet so months scroll internally while the buttons stay on-screen.

composables.name: FormaDateRangePickerSheet
composables.summary: Hosts M3's stable DateRangePicker in a FormaBottomSheet above an end-aligned button row. State is the caller's DateRangePickerState and the component wires nothing to the button slots — the confirm slot reads state.selectedStartDateMillis / state.selectedEndDateMillis itself (so it can disable itself until a complete range is picked). The default colors make the picker's own container transparent so it sits directly on the sheet surface.

params.name: onDismissRequest
params.description: called when the sheet is dismissed (scrim tap, back press, or swipe down) — hide the sheet by no longer composing it. There is no separate cancel callback; treat a dismiss as closed-without-confirming.

params.name: state
params.description: the hoisted Material 3 state; create it with rememberDateRangePickerState. Read state.selectedStartDateMillis and state.selectedEndDateMillis (UTC epoch millis, Long?) in the confirm slot's click handler. The picker's locale is captured when the state is created (Material 3 behavior).

params.name: confirmButton
params.description: the primary action slot (required), typically a FormaButton. The component attaches no click handling or label — the slot owns both.

params.name: modifier
params.description: the Modifier applied to the sheet.

params.name: dismissButton
params.description: the optional secondary/cancel action slot, shown before confirmButton.

params.name: showModeToggle
params.description: whether the picker shows Material 3's calendar-to-text-input mode toggle.

params.name: skipPartiallyExpanded
params.description: whether the sheet skips the half-expanded state and opens fully. Defaults to true — deliberately unlike FormaBottomSheet — because the half-expanded state clips the calendar grid.

params.name: shape
params.description: the sheet container shape. When null, Material 3's top-rounded default is used.

params.name: colors
params.description: the DatePickerColors for the picker. When null, Material 3's defaults are used with a transparent picker container so the picker sits directly on the sheet surface (avoiding a container-on-container seam). A supplied value is passed through untouched.

supportingApi.name: rememberDateRangePickerState
supportingApi.summary: The component defines no state type of its own — callers create and own the picker state via Material 3's rememberDateRangePickerState (initial range, selectableDates, yearRange, initialDisplayMode, saveability) and read selectedStartDateMillis / selectedEndDateMillis from it.

variants: Text-input mode (initialDisplayMode or the mode toggle)
accessibility: Inherits Material 3's DateRangePicker semantics — day cells expose full-date content descriptions with range start/end announcements, the mode toggle has its own content description, and navigation controls are labeled — plus ModalBottomSheet's back-press and scrim dismiss handling; the button slots are caller-supplied (typically FormaButtons with M3's 48dp minimum touch target).
